task.json description line 5; export_result.sh line 91; verifier.py line 104
task.json description ('Insert all five chapter files'); verifier.py line 67 checks link_count == 5

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creation of an Apache OpenOffice Master Document (.odm) that links five ODT chapter files. The chapter files are synthetically generated by setup_task.sh using odfpy with the exact filenames: 01_introduction.odt, 02_safety_protocols.odt, 03_operation_procedures.odt, 04_maintenance_schedule.odt, and 05_troubleshooting.odt, located in /home/ga/Documents/chapters/. The output file must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/AeroTurbine_Master.odm with the title 'AeroTurbine 500-X Operator Manual' and all five chapter files linked (not copy-pasted). The verifier validates file existence, ODM format, exactly 5 linked chapters in numerical order, presence of a Table of Contents, and the correct title text.
